overall.description: A first-person perspective from a flying vehicle navigating through the neon-lit skyscrapers of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle performs a dramatic descent from high altitude through dense urban canyons, passing holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture. The clip showcases the game's ray-traced lighting and cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy use of neon pinks, blues, and greens.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude rooftop flight above dense urban core

events.description: begins gradual descent from high altitude toward street level

agents.ego_description: flying the vehicle forward over skyscrapers while descending toward the neon-lit district below

notable_agents.action: another flying vehicle visible in the distance ahead, traveling same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign with 'ORBITAL AIR' text visible on left side of frame
dense collection of floating holographic advertisements and digital screens between buildings
tall glass and steel buildings forming a canyon-like corridor ahead
pink neon hotel sign becoming visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude flight over Night City's dense downtown core. The vehicle floats above glass skyscrapers while descending toward a cluster of neon signs. The ORBITAL AIR sign dominates the left side while holographic billboards fill the center view. The sky is fully visible above the urban canyon, and the road surface is far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep descent through neon-lit building canyon toward hotel intersection

events.description: initiates sharp left bank while continuing descent toward street level
passing into shadow of buildings with increased neon reflection from pink hotel sign

agents.ego_description: banking the flying car sharply left while descending through the narrow gap between skyscrapers toward the hotel sign

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with 'WET DREAM' text and pink neon lighting on right building facade
crossroads with traffic lights and road markings becoming visible as altitude decreases
zebra crossing markings on the road surface now visible at lower altitude

segments.scene_description: The vehicle banks sharply left while descending through a narrow canyon of skyscrapers. The pink neon HOTEL sign moves from center to the left as the car approaches street level. The WET DREAM billboard dominates the right side. The sky becomes partially obscured by surrounding buildings, and street-level details like crosswalks become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: main avenue with cherry blossom trees and digital billboards

events.description: levels out to stable street-level flight following descent
passes another flying vehicle traveling in opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: flying straight down the multi-lane avenue at street level, passing between rows of cherry trees and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: oncoming flying vehicle passing by in the opposite lane

entered.detail: row of pink flowering trees lining the left side of the avenue
series of vertical digital advertisement screens lining the right side of the street
tall street lights with multiple lamps illuminating the avenue center
massive building-mounted screen displaying advertisements on the left building

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the vehicle flies straight down a wide avenue lined with cherry blossom trees on the left and digital billboards on the right. The road is wet and reflective. The vehicle passes an oncoming flying car and continues between building facades with large digital screens. The sky is visible only as a narrow strip above the street canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with green circular building facade and tight turns

events.description: enters narrow enclosed corridor with green-lit circular building facade on left
makes slight right adjustment to navigate through tight alleyway

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through a narrow corridor between close building walls, adjusting course to avoid obstacles

entered.detail: distinctive building exterior with large green circular windows and neon green lighting
vertical digital screens mounted on the right wall of the narrow passage
cluster of palm trees visible on the right side of the corridor
bright green neon light fixture spanning across the top of the alley

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow enclosed alleyway with distinctive green circular windows on the left building. The space is tight with building walls close on both sides. Overhead green neon lights illuminate the passage. The vehicle makes minor course corrections to navigate the confined space while passing palm trees and wall-mounted advertisements on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from the high-altitude skyline of Night City down into the narrow, neon-drenched canyons of the downtown core. It begins with a floating perspective above glass skyscrapers, gliding toward a cluster of holographic billboards and a prominent Orbital Air sign while the open sky remains visible above. As the vehicle banks sharply to the left, the expansive view narrows into a tight urban corridor where the sky becomes obscured by towering architecture. The scene then shifts closer to the ground, passing a pink Hotel sign and a massive Wet Dream billboard as the lighting intensifies. Finally, the camera reaches the lower depths of the city, where the distant road surface transforms into clear street-level details and visible crosswalks.

The shot follows a continuous flight that transitions from a wide, reflective urban avenue into a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway. It begins at street level, gliding down a broad boulevard where cherry blossom trees on the left contrast with towering digital billboards on the right. As the vehicle passes an oncoming car, the camera maintains a straight trajectory through the wet, reflective canyon of building facades under a narrow strip of sky. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle veers into a tight, enclosed passage, where the open avenue is replaced by towering walls and distinctive green circular windows. Finally, the flight continues through this confined space, navigating between palm trees and wall-mounted advertisements under the glow of overhead green neon lights.
